title: Historical Incident Pattern Analysis Schema
description: Production JSON Schema designed to map trend vector clusters, semantic similarity indexes between live states and historical disasters, and output targeted mitigation recommendations.

current_operational_signature.description: The live state vector capturing current compounding anomalies and human factors (e.g., shift changeover).

historical_pattern_matches.description: Past incidents or disasters that semantically match the current operational signature.

threat_vector_cluster.description: The category of the impending failure mode.

targeted_mitigation_recommendations.description: Immediate proactive actions derived from the 'Lessons Learned' of the matched historical incident.
